[Transit (Single/Double)]

Service  fee

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Note: 
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee. For further clarifications, applicants can contact the Japan Visa Application Center.
visa_types.processing_time: - 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to transit through Japan.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to transit through Japan.

## Visa Fees
All fees must be paid in Mongolian Tugrik at the time of making your appointment online.

[Transit (Single/Double)]

Service  fee

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Note: 
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee. For further clarifications, applicants can contact the Japan Visa Application Center.

## Documents Required
TRANSIT (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/sasyo_ryouji_tsukasasyo_jpn_180904.html) 

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm, background font must be white, your face must be included in the 60 percent of the photograph and not more than 6 months old

## Processing Time
- 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)

## Download Forms

## Download  Forms here:

Visa Application Form to Japan
Letter of Guarantee
Travel Itinerary
Dispatch Letter (sample)
Overview of company/organization
List of visa applicants
Letter of Invitation
Declaration Form

visa_types.visa_fees:
All fees must be paid in Mongolian Tugrik at the time of making your appointment online.

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Service  fee

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Note: 
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee. For further clarifications, applicants can contact the Japan Visa Application Center.
visa_types.processing_time: - 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)
visa_types.overview:
Overview

- COE/ Certificate of Eligibility/ visa is for foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other than temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

- COE/ Certificate of Eligibility/ visa is for foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other than temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees
All fees must be paid in Mongolian Tugrik at the time of making your appointment online.

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Service  fee

[Table:Tourism – Single entry (E-Visa)]
Note: 
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee. For further clarifications, applicants can contact the Japan Visa Application Center.

## Documents Required
COE (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/long/index.html) 

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm, background font must be white, your face must be included in the 60 percent of the photograph and not more than 6 months old

## Processing Time
- 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)

## Download Forms

## Download  Forms here:

Visa Application Form to Japan
Letter of Guarantee
Travel Itinerary
Dispatch Letter (sample)
Overview of company/organization
List of visa applicants
Letter of Invitation
Declaration Form

visa_types.name: Business – Single entry
visa_types.documents_required:
Business-Single Entry (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/visa_singleentry_jpn.html) 
Business-Single Entry (Business, Cultural Exchange) (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/visa_singleentry_jpn.html) 
Additionally, applicants are required to provide  the below documents
Company  certificate
Company agreement
Tax payment by the company for last 3 years
6 month summarized bank statement with the Qr code

- Business single entry - visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of short-term business affairs.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Overview

- Tourism-single entry visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing. Alternatively, you may consider applying for an E-visa under this category
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees

Multiple Entry for foreign citizens other than Mongolians: https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html)
Additionally, applicants are required to provide the below documents
Company certificate
Company agreement
Tax payment by the company for last 3 years
6 month summarized bank statement with the Qr code

visa_types.processing_time: - 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)
visa_types.overview:
Overview

- Business Multiple entry visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of short-term business affairs.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

- Business Multiple entry visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of short-term business affairs.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees
All fees must be paid in Mongolian Tugrik at the time of making your appointment online.

[Table:Tourism – Multiple entry]
Service  fee

[Table:Tourism – Multiple entry]
Note: 
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 7 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee. For further clarifications, applicants can contact the Japan Visa Application Center.

## Documents Required
Business-Multiple Entry (general purpose): https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v49multi.html (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v49multi.html)
Business-Multiple Entry (business purpose): https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v13multi.html (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v13multi.html)
Business-Multiple Entry (high income earner): https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v82multi.html (https://www.mn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_ja/v82multi.html)
Multiple Entry for foreign citizens other than Mongolians: https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html)
Additionally, applicants are required to provide the below documents
Company certificate
Company agreement
Tax payment by the company for last 3 years
6 month summarized bank statement with the Qr code

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm, background font must be white, your face must be included in the 60 percent of the photograph and not more than 6 months old

## Processing Time
- 5 working days excluding the date of the application (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)

## Download Forms

## Download  Forms here:

Letter of Guarantee
Travel Itinerary
Dispatch Letter (sample)
Overview of company/organization
List of visa applicants
Letter of Invitation
Declaration Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview

- Medical Single entry visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

- Medical Single entry visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
- The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if you do not submit required supporting documents.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on these applications.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 5 business day (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc. so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
